task_completion.description: Create a chart displaying the primary instrument (AAPL) with daily bars.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A NinjaTrader chart window is open with 'AAPL' in the title or chart header, displaying daily price bars or candlesticks.

task_completion.description: Add the secondary instrument (MSFT) to the same chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Series configuration window shows both AAPL and MSFT added, or the chart window displays two distinct price series with both 'AAPL' and 'MSFT' visible in the chart legend/header.

task_completion.description: Add an Exponential Moving Average (EMA) indicator to the chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Indicators configuration window shows 'EMA' added to the 'Configured' list, or an EMA line is visible on the chart with 'EMA' in the indicator legend.
In the Indicators configuration window, the 'Period' parameter for the EMA is set to '20', or the chart legend explicitly shows 'EMA(20)'.

task_completion.description: Apply the EMA indicator specifically to the MSFT data series.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Indicators configuration window, the 'Input series' for the EMA is set to 'MSFT' (or index 1), OR the chart legend shows the EMA is tied to MSFT (e.g., 'EMA(20) [MSFT]'), OR the EMA line visually tracks the MSFT price series instead of the AAPL series.
The agent clicks 'Workspaces' -> 'Save' or 'Save As' in the NinjaTrader Control Center, or a save dialog for the workspace is confirmed.

integrity.description: The agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the chart and indicators.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse movements, clicks, and window interactions within the NinjaTrader 8 application are visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The authentic NinjaTrader 8 interface (Control Center, Chart windows, Data Series/Indicators dialogs) is used, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass GUI configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows, PowerShell scripts, or code editors are used to directly modify NinjaTrader XML workspace files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Primary instrument is AAPL, secondary instrument is MSFT. Data is Daily OHLCV spanning Jan 2023 to Dec 2024. The required indicator is EMA (Exponential Moving Average) with a period of 20. Crucially, the EMA must be applied to the secondary series (MSFT), which corresponds to input series index 1 in NinjaTrader. By default, indicators apply to the primary series (index 0), so the agent must explicitly change the 'Input series' parameter in the EMA properties.
